description: List event invitation templates. Endpoint: GET /c/{company_id}/event_invitation_templates. Required parameters: title, company_id. Optional parameters include include_last_used.
example_request:
GET /c/{company_id}/event_invitation_templates

Required params: title, company_id

Optional params: include_last_used

event_invitation_templates.title: Template
event_invitation_templates.subject: You have an interview scheduled
event_invitation_templates.body_html: You have an interview scheduled, Regards
